evidence: Milestone block arc (FGAP-037 milestone block kind; FGAP-039 phase→milestone placement relation; FGAP-041 story_includes_item wildcard) verified end-to-end on the integration branch. Gates: npm run build / check / test green, 0 failures. Real validated-write demo (block-api appendRelationByRef via tsx, NOT direct-write): a phase_positioned_in_milestone edge in parent=phase/child=milestone is ACCEPTED by the write-time validator and REJECTED in the reverse orientation (source kind milestone not in source_kinds [phase]); context-current-state then derives the milestone `reached` when its placed (parent) phase buckets to complete and `planned` otherwise; a milestone with zero edges or a dangling parent endpoint is `planned`, no throw. The reached-milestone-phases-complete invariant (severity error) fires on a milestone authored `reached` with an incomplete placed phase. Fresh-context adversarial probe: 6/6 checks hold, no residual wrong-direction artifact. The direction defect (the deriver read parent=milestone) and the canonical_id/data_path mismatch (milestones.json → milestone.json) were corrected in the iterate-to-zero (96d37ee) and re-verified. story_contains_task retired in favor of story_includes_item. Merged to context-jit-spec-v2 at 18cca3d; op strings + SKILL.md + bundled-resources + CHANGELOG synced; both READMEs audited-clean.

criteria_results.evidence: fresh install materializes .context/milestone.json; currentState derives milestones[].status

criteria_results.evidence: phase_positioned_in_milestone registered (source phase/target milestone); reached deriver rolls up the parent phases

criteria_results.evidence: registered in catalog + config; story_contains_task removed

criteria_results.criterion: Edge direction is consistent across registration, validator, deriver, invariant (parent=phase/child=milestone)
criteria_results.evidence: real validated write: correct orientation accepted, reverse rejected; deriver reads validator-accepted edge

criteria_results.criterion: reached is derived, not authored; backstopped by the reached-milestone-phases-complete invariant
criteria_results.evidence: currentState computes reached from placed-phase completion; invariant errors on a reached milestone with an incomplete placed phase
